payload.answer: The new information appears additive: Sam from Goldman likes Sonny Rollins in addition to Bill Evans. Please choose how to handle it.
repair_options: add_new: Add “Sam from Goldman likes Sonny Rollins” as a separate preference while keeping the existing Bill Evans preference.
keep_existing: Keep only the existing memory that Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans and do not add the Sonny Rollins preference.
edit: Edit the preference record to represent both Bill Evans and Sonny Rollins, if you want them stored together.
cancel: Do not make any changes.
